case_title: STALVEY, JENNIFER VS CENTRAL CALIFORNIA THEATERS, INC.

docket_entries.description: SIMILAR TO THOSE FORMERLY DISTRIBUTED THROUGH PLFT UNTIL SUCH TIME AS THIS JUDGMT HAS BEEN SATISFIED. ONCE THE JUDGMT IS SATISFIED, DEFT MAY RESUME
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CENTRAL CALIFORNIA THEATERS, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,560.00 FILED BY STALVEY, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT CENTRAL CALIFORNIA THEATERS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CENTRAL CALIFORNIA THEATERS, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STALVEY, JENNIFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CENTRAL CALIFORNIA THEATERS, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,022.00, DEFT C.C.T. TERMINATED ITS CONTRACTUAL RELATION W/ PLFT AFTER DEFENDANT'S AGENT MR. NASSER OBTAINED PLFT'S PROPIERTARY ROUTE LIST W/C WAS APPROPRIATED BY DEFT W/ ACTUAL MALICE. DEFT THEREFORE USED SAID ROUTE LIST TO PROMOTE DEFT'S BUSINESS & CAUSE HARM TO PLFT.DEFT IS HEREBY ENJOINED FROM ANY FURTHER FUTURE DISTRIBUTION OF THE QUARTERLY CALENDAR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
